_meta.note: Fire & Blood reconciler output for fab-sons-of-the-dragon-05-p01 (smoke=True).

edges.quote: the maiden daughter of the Lord of the Tides, Aethan Velaryon
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aethan Velaryon PARENT_OF Alyssa Velaryon

edges.quote: King Aegon’s lord admiral and master of ships
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aethan Velaryon SERVES Aegon I Targaryen

edges.quote: he named the King’s Hand, Lord Alyn Stokeworth
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Aegon I Targaryen APPOINTS Alyn Stokeworth

edges.quote: Harren sliced off his genitals and fed them to a dog
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Harren the Red ASSAULTS Gargon Qoherys

edges.quote: he slew the King’s Hand, Lord Alyn Stokeworth
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Harren the Red KILLS Alyn Stokeworth

edges.quote: before being cut down by Stokeworth’s squire, Bernarr Brune
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Bernarr Brune KILLS Harren the Red

edges.quote: When Walter Wyl was delivered into his hands, wounded but alive
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Orys Baratheon CAPTURES Walter Wyl

edges.quote: he hacked off Lord Walter's sword hand
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Orys Baratheon ASSAULTS Walter Wyl
Fire & Blood: Wyl of Wyl ASSAULTS Orys Baratheon

edges.quote: brought “King” Lodos (Second of That Name) to a similar swift end
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Goren Greyjoy KILLS Lodos the Twice-Drowned

edges.quote: easily defeating the supporters of the self-styled King of Mountain and Vale
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Allard Royce DEFEATS Jonos Arryn

edges.quote: Orys Baratheon, known now as Orys One-Hand
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Orys Baratheon ALIAS_OF Orys One-Hand
Fire & Blood: Harmon Dondarrion ALIAS_OF No-Nose Dondarrion

edges.quote: who became known as Gargon the Guest
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Gargon Qoherys ALIAS_OF Gargon the Guest

edges.quote: The son came the next year
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Alyssa Velaryon AGENT_IN Birth of Aegon (son of Aenys)

edges.quote: marshalling a hundred longships to descend on Old Wyk and Great Wyk
